migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

extracted_tasks.text: Contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Alice Tran to contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing. Deadline: March 5, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Bob Morrison to complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen. Deadline: March 17, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Dave Chen to prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office. Deadline: March 12, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Farida Osei to complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review. Deadline: March 10, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Carol Nguyen to conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee. Deadline: March 7, 20

extracted_tasks.text: Assess impact on Site A cutover given revised switch delivery date of March 20.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Carol to assess impact on Site A cutover.

extracted_tasks.text: Initiate knowledge transfer plan immediately given Bob Morrison's potential departure.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Knowledge transfer plan must be initiated immediately given his role as the sole AD migration expert.

extracted_tasks.text: Notify HR regarding Bob Morrison potentially leaving SSC within 60 days.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: HR to be notified.

extracted_tasks.text: Assess refactoring effort for migration script dependency on deprecated "legacy-sync" API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Bob to assess refactoring effort.

From: marie.lefebvre@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: project-team-ngis@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Weekly Status / Mise à jour hebdomadaire
Date: Wed, 4 Mar 2026 10:05:00 -0500

Hello team / Bonjour l'équipe,

ENGLISH SECTION:

This week's status update for NGIS Phase 3 is as follows:

Work completed:
- Active Directory migration for Site A (Gatineau) is 80% complete.
- Network topology diagrams updated to reflect revised switch placement.

Action Items (English):
1. Please schedule a follow-up tech

extracted_tasks.text: Schedule a follow-up technical review meeting before March 11 to finalize the AD migration cutover plan. Coordinate with Dave Chen.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Please schedule a follow-up technical review meeting before March 11 to finalize the AD migration cutover plan. Coordinate with Dave Chen.

extracted_tasks.text: Review the updated security compliance checklist (attached) and confirm sign-off by March 9, 2026.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: All team members must review the updated security compliance checklist (attached) and confirm sign-off by March 9, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Mettre à jour le registre des risques du projet d'ici le 10 mars 2026 pour inclure le risque de délai du fournisseur.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Veuillez mettre à jour le registre des risques du projet d'ici le 10 mars 2026 pour inclure le risque de délai du fournisseur.

extracted_tasks.text: Confirmez les livrables révisés avec le fournisseur principal (TechSupplier) d'ici le 12 mars 2026.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Confirmez les livrables révisés avec le fournisseur principal (TechSupplier) d'ici le 12 mars 2026. Responsable : Gestionnaire de projet.

NGIS PHASE 3 — WEEKLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 24 – March 3, 2026
Report Date: March 3, 2026
Project Manager: Alice Tran
Project ID: NGIS-P3-2024-001
Overall Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The NGIS Phase 3 data centre consolidation project continues to progress
according to plan. The team has completed the Active Directory migration
for the test environment and finalized network topology designs for Sites
B and C. No risks are identified at this time.

---
